text: Stepping from a sterile, empty corridor into a vibrant and thoughtfully curated space, I feel the contrast between absence and presence. The first scene evokes a feeling of liminality—an in-between space, quiet and almost expectant. Moving to the next, I am imbued with curiosity and stimulation as I confront the deliberate provocations of design and text, inviting me to reflect. Here, the environment asks me to think deeper about how humans connect and innovate. I feel awake, contemplative, and strangely at home among questions rather than answers.
